name: reviewgate
description: Multi-agent code review gate for Claude Code's agent loop

scripts.build: bun build src/cli/index.ts --compile --outfile dist/reviewgate && mkdir -p dist/grammars dist/bin-templates && cp node_modules/tree-sitter-typescript/*.wasm node_modules/tree-sitter-python/*.wasm dist/grammars/ 2>/dev/null; cp bin-templates/*.sh dist/bin-templates/ 2>/dev/null; cp -r src/personas dist/personas 2>/dev/null || true
scripts.self-review: bun run dev init && bun run dev gate --hook trigger </dev/null && bun run dev gate --hook stop </dev/null
